current.headline: Spain and Argentina Prepare for World Cup Final Clash in New Jersey
current.summary: La Roja and the Albiceleste go head-to-head at MetLife Stadium for the ultimate crown. Messi aims to seal his final legacy while Spain's young generation looks to make history.

items.headline: Lamine Yamal and Lionel Messi Face Off in Generation Clash Final
items.summary: The teenage sensation Lamine Yamal faces his idol Lionel Messi in a historic rating duel. Both playmakers hold the keys to unlocking the opposition's defense.

items.headline: Referee Jesús Valenzuela Warns of High Intensity Final Clash
items.summary: Match officials prepare for a high-intensity duel between the physical Argentine defense and Spain's technical attack. Bookmakers anticipate cards and early fouls.
